idea-plugin.name: Processing Project Generator
idea-plugin.description:
Generates a ready-to-run Processing (processing.org) Maven project inside IntelliJ IDEA.

  • Auto-detects your Processing 4 installation on macOS, Windows and Linux
  • Installs core.jar into your local Maven repository automatically
  • Scaffolds a Maven project with the correct dependency and a starter sketch

action.description: Generate a new Processing sketch project
